name: Context by Distinct Information: An Auditable Dirichlet-Process Working Memory for Long, Redundant Context Streams
summary: arXiv:2607.10441v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Context engineering decides what information a model carries forward, and current designs meter it in tokens: compressing the past into a bounded r...
description: arXiv:2607.10441v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Context engineering decides what information a model carries forward, and current designs meter it in tokens: compressing the past into a bounded recurrent state, keeping a key-value entry for every token, or imposing a fixed budget through a window or eviction rule. All three make the token the unit of memory even when the stream is redundant a...
author: Siddharth Pal, Viktoria Rojkova
